title: Hunger Begone
description: A mod centered around the player's hunger system, making hunger last longer and more player-friendly through enchantments and other features.
body:
## Hunger Begone - Project Description
### Project Overview
Hunger Begone is a food and adventure mod designed exclusively for Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric. Centered around the player's hunger system, this mod revamps hunger management into a more engaging and user-friendly experience through unique enchantments, cooking utensils, and a dedicated food system.

### Complete Cooking System
- **Stove & Oven**: New Stove and Oven blocks featuring the mod's unique cooking mechanics
- **Pan System**: Cook food with the Pan on the Stove, supporting multiple uses
- **Mortar and Pestle**: Used for grinding ingredients and crafting special food items
- **Shelf**: Place items inside to receive hints for food recipes

Added nearly 30 food items (currently in development)

### 6 Enchantments
- **Nourishment**: Converts the health of slain entities into saturation
- **Nutrition**: Gain experience when consuming food
- **Speed**: Increases sprint speed while saturation is above 0
- **Warmth**: Immunity to powder snow damage when hunger is high
- **Enthusiasm**: Enhances knockback and negative effect duration based on saturation
- **Field Harvester**: Grants slow falling near farmland and boosts harvesting efficiency

### Technical Information
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric 0.18.4+
- **Required Dependencies**: Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin
- **Java Version**: Java 17+
- **Environment**: Required on both client and server

### Credits
- **Development & Partial Textures**: Hydroceder
- **Additional Textures & Inspiration**: Corn_Boom_

### License
